---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent or skill for ROS 2 development
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the use case for this feature. What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## ROS 2 Domain
Which ROS 2 area does this feature relate to?
- [ ] Navigation (Nav2)
- [ ] Manipulation (MoveIt2)
- [ ] Real-time systems
- [ ] Embedded/Micro-ROS
- [ ] Simulation (Gazebo/Ignition)
- [ ] Hardware drivers
- [ ] Build system (colcon)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
